calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Grand Wong.

Ms. Ng stated that she thinks Mr. Chan exhausted everything in Ohio with regard to obtaining evidence of family relations, that all photos were destroyed, that she has heard nothing from anyone and that the Parties are in agreement to do the right thing. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution of Decedent's Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
